content.observe: There are four ways to deal with a deadlock: prevent it from ever forming, avoid it dynamically, detect it after the fact, or recover once it's happened.
content.fault: You reached for detection when this vault needed prevention. The wrong approach won't save you here — pick the one that matches the situation.

hotspots.label: Prevention
hotspots.detail: Structurally rule out one of the four necessary conditions.

hotspots.label: Avoidance
hotspots.detail: Grant resources only when the resulting state is provably safe.

hotspots.label: Detection
hotspots.detail: Let it happen, then find it by scanning the wait-for graph.

hotspots.label: Recovery
hotspots.detail: Break an existing deadlock via termination or resource preemption.
